hero.subtitle: Pick your own fish from our daily catch. Authentic Mediterranean cuisine since generations.

about.title: Welcome to
about.p1: Since 2003, we have proudly served only locally sourced wild fish and seafood, building a strong reputation for consistent quality and true authenticity. Our commitment to freshness and simplicity has remained at the heart of everything we do, allowing the natural flavors of the sea to shine in every dish.
about.p2: With over 20 years of experience, our cuisine is rooted in Mediterranean traditions, thoughtfully blending Greek influences with a carefully curated menu focused on seafood. Each plate is crafted with care, offering rich, vibrant flavors that reflect both our heritage and our passion for exceptional food.
about.p3: Our interior evokes the charm of a vintage taverna, welcoming guests with warm colors and unique decorative touches inspired by the sea. From collections of international currency to a cozy corner featuring photographs of old Saranda, every detail tells a story, complemented by the timeless sounds of Greek laïka music that fill the space with character and warmth.
about.p4: Over the years, we have earned the trust of our local community and become a beloved gathering place for both residents and visitors. We warmly invite you to join us, enjoy our delicious flavors, and experience genuine hospitality in a relaxed and inviting atmosphere.
about.tagline: Where locals go for fresh, authentic seafood.
